title: Fix CSV column name mismatch in export
description: The CSV exporter was using 'user_name' as the column header but the data dictionary uses 'username'. This caused an empty column in exported CSVs.
diff:
diff --git a/export/csv_writer.py b/export/csv_writer.py
index 7c8d9e0..f1a2b3c 100644
--- a/export/csv_writer.py
+++ b/export/csv_writer.py
@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@ import csv
 from typing import Any
 
 
-EXPORT_COLUMNS = ["id", "user_name", "email", "created_at"]
+EXPORT_COLUMNS = ["id", "username", "email", "created_at"]
 
 
 def export_users(users: list[dict[str, Any]], output_path: str) -> int:
comments: dave: Was wondering why the username column was always empty. Approve.
author: emma
